name: Margins
based_on: A realistic, evergreen example modeled on a common real-world need: a personal writing/dev blog in the mold of an indie engineer's site (think craft-of-software essays plus code posts), built on Astro content collections.
summary: A writing and dev blog: a tagged post index, reading-first article pages with Shiki code highlighting, an about page, per-tag archives, light/dark reading themes, and an RSS feed — all static Astro.
sections: Post index homepage with intro, tag chips, and a reverse-chronological list (date, title, description, tags, reading time)
Article pages with reading-first typography, byline, code highlighting, and prev/next navigation
Syntax-highlighted code blocks via Astro's built-in Shiki, plus styled inline code and blockquotes
Tags: an all-tags index with counts and a page per tag
About page with author photo, bio, and follow links
RSS 2.0 feed at /rss.xml, auto-discovered from the document head
Light/dark reading themes with a header toggle persisted in localStorage
setup_questions: What's the blog name and topic/voice?
